dom.title: The page you were looking for doesn't exist (404)
dom.headContent:
<title>The page you were looking for doesn't exist (404)</title>
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.bunny.net">
    <link href="https://fonts.bunny.net/css?family=lato:400,400i,700" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
      html,
      body {
        height: 100%;
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
      }
      body {
        display: grid;
        align-items: center;
        margin: 0 12px;
        background-color: #fff;
        color: #2d3b45;
        text-align: center;
        font-family: Lato, arial, sans-serif;
      }
      svg {
        margin: 24px 0 40px;
      }
      h1 {
        margin-bottom: 12px;
        font-weight: 700;
        font-size: 22px;
        line-height: 28px;
      }
      p {
        margin: 0 0 12px;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 24px;
      }
      a {
        position: relative;
        display: inline-flex;
        margin: 40px 0 24px;
        padding: 7px 10px;
        border: 1px solid rgba(45, 59, 69, 0.2);
        border-radius: 4px;
        background-color: #0374b5;
        color: #fff;
        font-size: 16px;
        line-height: 24px;
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: background 0.2s ease 0s, transform 0.2s ease 0s;
      }
      a:hover {
        background-color: rgb(2, 84, 131);
      }
      a:active {
        background-color: rgb(2, 84, 131);
        box-shadow: rgb(1 52 81) 0px 0px 0.1875rem 0.0625rem inset;
      }
      a:focus {
        outline: none;
      }
      a::before {
        pointer-events: none;
        content: "";
        position: absolute;
        border-style: solid;
        border-width: 0.125rem;
        border-color: rgb(3, 116, 181);
        opacity: 0;
        border-radius: calc(0.4375rem);
        inset: calc(-0.3125rem);
        transition: all 0.2s ease 0s;
        transform: scale(0.95);
      }
      a:focus::before {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
      }
    </style>
